en: Why, O LORD, do you stand afar off? Why do you hide yourself in times of trouble?
zh: 耶和華啊！你為甚麼遠遠地站著？在患難的時候，你為甚麼隱藏起來呢？

en: In arrogance the wicked hotly pursue the poor; let them be caught in the schemes that they have devised.
zh: 惡人驕橫地追逼困苦人， 願惡人陷入自己所設的陰謀中。

en: For the wicked boasts of the desires of his soul, and the one greedy for gain curses and renounces the LORD.
zh: 惡人誇耀心中的慾望， 他稱讚貪財的人，卻藐視耶和華 。

en: In the pride of his face the wicked does not seek him; all his thoughts are, "There is no God."
zh: 惡人面帶驕傲，說：“耶和華必不追究！” 在他的一切思想中，都沒有 神。

en: His ways prosper at all times; your judgments are on high, out of his sight; as for all his foes, he puffs at them.
zh: 他的道路時常穩妥， 你的判斷高超，他卻不放在眼內； 他對所有的仇敵都嗤之以鼻。

en: He says in his heart, "I shall not be moved; throughout all generations I shall not meet adversity."
zh: 他心裡說：“我必永不搖動， 我決不會遭遇災難。”

en: His mouth is filled with cursing and deceit and oppression; under his tongue are mischief and iniquity.
zh: 他口裡充滿咒詛、詭詐和欺壓的話， 舌頭底下盡是毒害與奸惡。

en: He sits in ambush in the villages; in hiding places he murders the innocent. His eyes stealthily watch for the helpless;
zh: 他在村莊裡埋伏等候， 在隱密處殺害無辜的人， 他的眼睛暗地裡窺探不幸的人。

en: he lurks in ambush like a lion in his thicket; he lurks that he may seize the poor; he seizes the poor when he draws him into his net.
zh: 他在隱密處埋伏，像獅子埋伏在叢林中； 他埋伏要擄走困苦人， 他把困苦人拉入自己的網中，擄走了他們。

en: The helpless are crushed, sink down, and fall by his might.
zh: 他擊打，他屈身蹲伏， 不幸的人就倒在他的爪下。

en: He says in his heart, "God has forgotten, he has hidden his face, he will never see it."
zh: 他心裡說：“ 神已經忘記了， 他已經掩面，永遠不看。”

en: Arise, O LORD; O God, lift up your hand; forget not the afflicted.
zh: 耶和華啊！求你起來； 神啊！求你舉起手來， 不要忘記困苦的人。

en: Why does the wicked renounce God and say in his heart, "You will not call to account"?
zh: 惡人為甚麼藐視 神， 心裡說：“你必不追究”呢？

en: But you do see, for you note mischief and vexation, that you may take it into your hands; to you the helpless commits himself; you have been the helper of the fatherless.
zh: 其實你已經看見了， 憂患與愁苦你都已經看到，並且放在自己的手中； 不幸的人把自己交託你； 你是幫助孤兒的。

en: Break the arm of the wicked and evildoer; call his wickedness to account till you find none.
zh: 願你打斷惡人和壞人的膀臂， 願你追究他們的惡行，直到清清楚楚。

en: The LORD is king forever and ever; the nations perish from his land.
zh: 耶和華作王直到永永遠遠， 列國都從他的地上滅亡。

en: O LORD, you hear the desire of the afflicted; you will strengthen their heart; you will incline your ear
zh: 耶和華啊！困苦人的心願你已經聽見， 你必堅固他們的心，也必留心聽他們的呼求；

en: to do justice to the fatherless and the oppressed, so that man who is of the earth may strike terror no more.
zh: 好為孤兒和受欺壓的人伸冤， 使地上的人不再施行恐嚇。
